text:
A five-timeOlympicathlete has been found dead inside her apartment after she reportedly choked on her food.

Daniela Larreal Chirinos was reported missing by colleagues on August 12 after failing to show up at the hotel where she worked in Las Vegas.

Police officers discovered the 50-year-old’s lifeless body four days later when they broke into her home to check on her.

An autopsy carried out by state authorities in Nevada found solid food remains lodged in Larreal’s windpipe and is thought to have died of asphyxiation.

Investigations are still ongoing and her official cause of death has not yet been confirmed but Larreal is believed to have been dead since August 11.

The track cyclist is one of Venezuela’s most illustrious sports stars and is the nation’s only athlete to have competed in five different Olympic Games between 1992 and 2012.

Despite never clinching a podium finish at the Olympics, Larreal was awarded four diplomas – a certificate handed to the top eight finishers in a competition at the Games.

Larreal also won numerous gold medals during her career, including at the Pan American Games and South American Games.

After London 2012, Larreal publicly opposed Venezuela’s president Nicolas Maduro when he took over from Hugo Chaves and accused the new government’s Ministry of Sports of corruption.

She went on to become an activist who persistently stood up for ‘freedom and democracy’, effectively claiming Venezuela had become a dictatorship.

But Larreal’s criticism of Maduro and the government led to her being subjected to death threats, so she fled her home country in exile and moved to the USA.

It didn’t stop her from campaigning and even her last Instagram post on August 8 referenced the ongoing political unrest in Venezuela following Maduro’s disputed victory in July’s election.

Politician Henrique Capriles paid tribute to ‘a great figure in cycling’ and ‘specialist in track events’.

He wrote on X: ‘Daniela, in addition to winning medals, stood out for being the only Venezuelan to have participated in five Olympic Games. A glory of sport!

‘I join in the mourning that afflicts the country and send my heartfelt words of condolence to her family, friends and those who were her teammates in her sporting career. May god receive Daniela in eternal rest.’

title: Olympic cyclist found dead at home after 'choking on food' | Metro News
description: Daniela Larreal Chirinos was reported missing four days before she was found in Las Vegas having previously fled her home in Venezuela.
